title: Sochi Boat Rental: A 2026 Guide to Cruising the Black Sea
html:
Sochi offers an unforgettable boating experience along the Black Sea coast, with private charters starting from around 250 EUR for a half-day trip. Whether you want to explore the coastline or drop anchor in a secluded bay, BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat owners to make it happen. The Imeretinsky Port serves as a modern departure point for most excursions.

Where to set off in Sochi?

Set off from Imeretinsky Port or the central port near the Riviera Park. These are the main hubs for boat hire in Sochi. Other launch points include the yacht marina at Adler, the fishing harbour in Khosta, and the small beachfront docks at Dagomys and Lazarevskoye. Each offers different access to the open sea.

For a day trip, many boats head to the Bird Rock (Skala Ptitsa) or the Ursula Kerge underwater reef, which are about 10 nautical miles from the central port. You can also explore the Sochi National Park coastline from the water, where the forest meets the sea.

Which boat to rent in Sochi?

  1. Small motorboat (deck boat): best for 2, 4 people exploring bays at low cost; from 200 EUR for four hours.
  2. Mid-size cabin cruiser: ideal for 6, 8 guests with an overnight option; from 400 EUR per day.
  3. Luxury motor yacht (e.g. Azimut 58): perfect for 10, 12 guests with full crew and amenities; from 900 EUR per day. You can browse the Azimut 58 for hire on BoatHire24.
  4. Sailing catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42): stable and spacious for 8, 10 people; from 700 EUR for a full day.
  5. RIB tender: fast and nimble for up to 6, great for water sports; from 150 EUR per hour.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Sochi?

Prices in Sochi range from 50 EUR per person for a group tour to over 1,200 EUR for a full day on a premium crewed yacht. The cost depends on boat size, duration, and season. Use the boat search to compare verified listings.

  • Shared group tour (3 hours): from 50 EUR per person.
  • Small motorboat, half-day (4 hours): 200 to 350 EUR.
  • Catamaran, full-day (8 hours): 700 to 1,000 EUR.
  • Crewed luxury yacht, full-day (8 hours): 900 to 1,500 EUR.

High season (June through September) sees prices about 20 per cent higher, but availability is good if you book a charter online early. Payment is made in EUR through the platform.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Sochi?

In Russia, you generally need a licence for powered vessels over 10 horsepower unless the boat is hired with a skipper. Most holidaymakers opt for a skippered charter, which requires no licence. The operator on BoatHire24 confirms exact requirements before booking. Seasoned skippers know that the Sochi coastline can experience a local north-easterly wind known as the bora, which can pick up quickly in the afternoon, so a local crew adds safety.

Local tip: anchor in Loo Bay early in the morning to enjoy calm water before the afternoon breeze arrives. The water there is unusually clear for the Black Sea.

At a glance

  • Price range: from 50 EUR per person to 1,500 EUR for a full-day luxury charter.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Typical trip: 4 to 8 hours (half-day or full-day).
  • Maximum guests: up to 12 on yachts, 6 on small motorboats.
  • Currency: transactions in EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Sochi

Can I rent a boat for a day with no experience?

Yes, you can hire a skippered charter, which means a professional captain handles navigation while you relax.

How far in advance should I book for summer 2026?

Booking at least two weeks ahead is wise for July and August, as popular boats often book out.

Are there any evening or sunset cruises available?

Many operators offer evening cruises from 6pm to 9pm, with dinner included, usually costing from 70 EUR per person.

What happens if the weather is bad on my booking day?

Most captains will offer to reschedule or provide a full refund; the BoatHire24 platform includes a cancellation policy to protect you.

Now you are ready to plan your Black Sea adventure. To compare options for your dates, use the boat search tool on BoatHire24. The platform makes it simple to find the right vessel for your group.

If you own a boat in Sochi, you can earn extra income by listing it on the same marketplace. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Sochi or list your own. Visit BoatHire24 and check availability for your chosen dates in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Sochi and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
